title: Capital One (COF) Q1 Earnings Beat as NII Improves, Stock Down
text: Rise in consumer loan demand supports NII, which along with robust credit card business, drives Capital One's (COF) Q1 earnings. Yet, higher provisions and a rise in expenses are headwinds.

title: Capital One Financial Corporation's (COF) CEO Richard Fairbank on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF.PK ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 26, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Jeff Norris - Senior Vice President, Global Finance Richard Fairbank - Chairman and CEO Andrew Young - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Sanjay Sakhrani - KBW Rick Shane - JPMorgan Bill Carcache - Wolfe Research John Pancari - Evercore ISI Ryan Nash - Goldman Sachs Betsy Graseck - Morgan Stanley Moshe Orenbuch - Credit Suisse Don Fandetti - Wells Fargo John Hecht - Jefferies Operator Good day, ladies and gentlemen. And welcome to the Capital One First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Capital One (COF) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Capital One (COF) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.27% and 1.95%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Over 19 Years, Old Faithful Has Averaged a 21% Return
text: Here are some new stocks to consider, spawned by my Old Faithful stock-picking paradigm.

title: What's in Store for Capital One (COF) This Earnings Season?
text: Improvement in consumer loan demand and solid card business are expected to have aided Capital One's (COF) Q1 earnings, while a rise in expenses and provision might have acted as headwinds.

title: Earnings Preview: Capital One (COF) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Capital One (COF) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Capital One (COF) Announces Additional $5B Share Buyback Plan
text: Capital One (COF) announces an additional share repurchase plan. This, along with steady dividend payouts, will continue to enhance shareholder value.

title: Capital One Financial Corporation to Webcast Conference Call on First Quarter 2022 Earnings
